data.description: You can regain spent spell slots by studying. Once per day, you might study a selection of spells from one or more schools in your wizard's spellbook. The number of slots you recover is equal to half your wizard level (rounded down), with a maximum of six slots.

When reach level, choose arcane an you tradition, of through one your shaping practice magic of schools: Conjuration, Oivination, Abjuration, eight Enchantment, Evocation, Necromancy, Illusion, or Transmutation, detailed the of class description. Your grants features 2nd and choice you at 10th, 14th, at end the 6th, and leveI.
